title: Imported video bugs: no prompt box on model-less imports + only first import gets fps/duration
description: Two import-side gallery bugs found 2026-06-14 (log clean, no throw — logic/data, NOT the SaveVideo split). (1) Dragging videos into the gallery + opening in history shows NO prompt box; hovering it reports 'No prompt-driven ops available for this model' — imported media has modelId:null so prompt-driven op resolution yields none (universal video tools should still work via the tool panel). (2) Importing 3 videos (audio/no-audio/audio), only the FIRST shows length(seconds)+fps; the other two lack probed metadata — import video-probe ran once, not per-file. Both a different subsystem than gen→save→mux. See brief.md.
